title: Fiddleful Features
description: Adds a bunch'o miscellaneous features to Minecraft that I want ! Weapons, enchantments, blocks, or whatever !
body:
# About Fiddleful Features
It adds features full of fiddle.
Be it a new block, biome, mob, weapon, whatever your fiddleful head can come up with, I'll probably add it.. if i can figure out how. This is my first actual mod afterall,,,,,
This mod is sorta small right now with just the Gambling Update, but I plan on expanding it a lot more with themed updates! If you'd like, you can [request a Feature](https://github.com/Kripsybac0nn/Fiddleful-Suggestions/issues) and if it's cool enough I'll go "hm... perchance.."

## Current Features include...
### Misc
- The Netherite Mattock. A weapon/tool that functions as both a pickaxe and shovel because I HATE MINING INTO GRAVEL CANYON MID STRIPMINE AND HAVING TO SWITCH TO MY SHOVEL ITS SO ANNNOYING. Also you can throw it like a trident.
### The Gambling Update!
- Coins found in many different structures. Mineshafts, dungeons, shipwrecks and more!
- A Slot machine that you use coins to gamble for a buncha random stuff! From 1 Dirt to 5 Diamonds, or even an Enchanted Golden Apple.. Though the lever might be a little broken.. if you hit a jackpot it might pop right off! But fret not, you can replace it by simply crafting a lever for it.
- A new weapon called the Walletwhacker! The old lever to a slot machine, imbued with the magical power of poor gamblers!! With every hit you deal comes an added effect! It could be bad or good depending on how lucky you are. So good luck !
